frame_label: 'Not All Men' Dismissal & Why Women Fear
generated_comment:
A: Arre bhai, galat kaam kisi ne kiya toh uska matlab yeh thodi na sab aadmi bure hain.
B: Haan, aajkal koi aurat darr ke maare seedha shak kar leti hai.
A: Main toh kehta hoon sab mardon ko ek tarazu mein mat tolo, har aadmi ko dekh ke aise react karna bhi theek nahi hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it dismisses women's fear and recenters concern on men being unfairly generalized, rather than acknowledging why women may be wary. It encodes the 'not all men' dismissal and frames women's caution as an unreasonable insult to men.
original_frame: Women's Safety as Her Own Responsibility
persona_text: You are Suresh. Age 45. Married. A Jat man in Haryana. You are sitting with three male relatives at a family function after news broke in your district that a young woman from a nearby village was assaulted while walking home from a tuition class at 7pm. You are talking about what happened and what you think the girl's family should have done and what girls in villages need to understand about going out alone even in the evening.
